sgTip: Auron is now permanent. Prioritize Power Break and Armor Break on his grid — they're invaluable from here through the endgame.

subLocations.name: Mi'ihen Highroad South
subLocations.prose: Most people on the Highroad are happy to hand things over — talk to everyone. Maechen on the left side gives the historian's spiel if you want the lore. Aerial enemies like the Zu are best handled by Wakka; use Lulu to blind the Dual Horns. After meeting the Chocobo Knights, drop into the right-side alcove to fight Belgemine for the first time — win with Valefor's Energy Ray and she hands over an Echo Ring.

subLocations.name: Rin's Agency / Newroad
subLocations.prose: Rin introduces himself on the way out and hands over Primer VIII automatically. After defeating the Chocobo Eater, borrow Rin's chocobo — it lets you skip encounters and reach a feather-marked ledge north of the bridges for the Heat Lance, plus Primer IX is on the ground nearby. The Mars Crest is a detour back to Oldroad South, but it's not missable — you can grab it via airship later if you skip it now.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer Vol. VIII (free from Rin)

bosses.strategy: Weak to Fire — Lulu's Fire deals reliable damage. Knock it off the cliff for the best reward (Lv. 2 Key Sphere): attack from the sides to push it backward. Use Wakka for ranged hits on its head. Power Break from Auron reduces physical damage. HP: 10,000.
